title: 美國駐港總領事唐偉康視察葵涌廣場：怪得咁多年青人去

replies.msg:
https://www.facebook.com/USAinHKMacau/posts/10156820251831052?__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARAwBUDy39gcJsGlJV8BR3vgSYrl3TtHLKLOjfDbwGMG0LEonggxivJD6h9FAleQHcfVuwJF6FK7XUXnNmvHsRgD4OFhM5bw51cq0m8tYXegkfC-G9MMH8w_conZBHRvjQFSkfTjndfSit8Z0TAGka52I-6fFPd2ZlWOIiWLFXlOWa4PTINYVTk&__tn__=C-R

估下呢碗米線有幾辣? 我去左葵涌廣場食左呢個午餐。由夾糖、二手書到平衫，真係乜都有! 唔怪得咁多年青人去啦。-總領事唐偉康
Guess how spicy this bowl of rice noodles was? I enjoyed lunch and shopping at the Kwai Chung Plaza. From candy to used books to inexpensive clothing, it had everything! An amazing place for local young people to hang out. –KT
